help_menu: Click the buttons below to get information about my commands. Note: All commands can be used with /
help_admins: Admin commands: /pause: Puase the ongoing stream. /resume: Resume the paused stream. /skip: Skip the current stream. /stop: Stop the ongoing stream. /seek [duration in seconds]: Seek the ongoing stream. /seekback [duration in seconds]: Seek the ongoing stream backward. /reload: Reloads the admin cache.
help_auth: Auth commands: Authorized users can control the ongoing stream without being an admin. /auth: Add a user to the authorized users list. /unauth: Remove a user from the authorized users list.
help_blist: Blacklist commands: Blacklisted chats and users cannot use the bot. /blacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Add a chat/user to the blacklist. /unblacklist [chat_id|user_id]: Remove a chat/user from the blacklist
help_lang: Language commands: This bot supports multiple languages. /lang: Change the language of the bot.
help_ping: Ping commands: /help: Shows the help menu of the bot. /ping: Check the ping and memory usage of the bot. /start: Start the bot. /sudolist: Shows the list of sudo users of the bot.
help_play: Play commands: You can play music in the video chat using the following commands. /play [song name/youtube url/reply to audio]: Play music in the video chat. /vplay [song name/youtube url/reply to video]: Play music video in the video chat. -f: Force play music in the video chat. -v: Plays music video in the video chat. Example: /play -f -v attention
help_queue: Queue commands: /queue: Shows the currently queued tracks in the queue.
help_autoplay: Autoplay commands: /autoplay [enable|disable]: Toggles the autoplay on/off for the chat.
help_vclog: VC Logger commands: /vclogger: Toggles the VC join/leave logger on/off for the chat.
help_sudo: Sudo commands: /ac: Shows the active calls count. /activevc: Shows the list of the active calls. /broadcast [reply to message]: Broadcasts the message to all the chats. -nochat: Excludes groups from the broadcast. -user: Include users in the broadcast. -copy: Removes the forwarded tag from the broadcast message. Example: /broadcast -user -copy /eval: Executes the given code. /logs: Sends the log file. /logger [on|off]: Enables/disables the logger. /restart: Restarts the bot. /updates: Pull the latest code from git and restart the bot. /addsudo: Add a user to the sudo users list. /rmsudo: Remove a user from the sudo users list.

welcome_instr: вһ» SбҙҮбҙӣ бҙЎбҙҮКҹбҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҮ бҙҚбҙҮssбҙҖЙўбҙҮ Reply to a message or pass text with /setwelcome. КҸбҙҸбҙң бҙ„бҙҖЙҙ бҙңsбҙҮ КңбҙӣбҙҚКҹ бҙҖЙҙбҙ…: вҖў {id} = бҙңsбҙҮКҖ ЙӘбҙ… вҖў {name} = бҙңsбҙҮКҖ ЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮ вҖў {surname} = бҙңsбҙҮКҖ sбҙңКҖЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮ вҖў {namesurname} = ЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… sбҙңКҖЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮ вҖў {lang} = бҙңsбҙҮКҖ КҹбҙҖЙҙЙўбҙңбҙҖЙўбҙҮ вҖў {date} = бҙ„бҙңКҖКҖбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ бҙ…бҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ вҖў {time} = бҙ„бҙңКҖКҖбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ бҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ вҖў {weekday} = бҙЎбҙҮбҙҮбҙӢ бҙ…бҙҖКҸ вҖў {mention} = КҹЙӘЙҙбҙӢ бҙӣбҙҸ бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙңsбҙҮКҖ бҙҳКҖбҙҸкң°ЙӘКҹбҙҮ вҖў {username} = бҙңsбҙҮКҖЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮ вҖў {groupname} = ЙўКҖбҙҸбҙңбҙҳ ЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮ вҖў {rules} = ЙўКҖбҙҸбҙңбҙҳ КҖбҙҮЙўбҙңКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ Buttons (via /setwelcomebutton), one row per line: Rules - https://t.me/link | Support - https://t.me/link Media: reply a photo/video with /setwelcomemedia. Toggle: /welcometoggle [on|off] В· Reset: /resetwelcome
welcome_set: вң“ бҙЎбҙҮКҹбҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҮ бҙҚбҙҮssбҙҖЙўбҙҮ sбҙҖбҙ бҙҮбҙ… бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙҮЙҙбҙҖКҷКҹбҙҮбҙ….
welcome_media_usage: Reply to a photo/video/GIF with /setwelcomemedia, or /setwelcomemedia off to clear.
welcome_button_usage: Send button spec with /setwelcomebutton, one row per line: Text - https://url | Text - https://url Use /setwelcomebutton off to clear.
welcome_button_invalid: вң— NбҙҸ бҙ бҙҖКҹЙӘбҙ… КҷбҙңбҙӣбҙӣбҙҸЙҙs кң°бҙҸбҙңЙҙбҙ…. UкңұбҙҮ: Text - https://url
queue_finished: вһІ бҙӣКңбҙҮ ПҷбҙңбҙҮбҙңбҙҮ КңбҙҖs Т“ЙӘЙҙЙӘsКңбҙҮбҙ…. бҙңsбҙҮ /play бҙӣбҙҸ бҙҖбҙ…бҙ… бҙҚбҙҸКҖбҙҮ.вҡЎпёҸ
